examples: The true hermit is a rare aberration.
It became very clear that the incident was not just an aberration; it was not just a single incident.
An expectable aberration in the climatic regime may have been enough to cause the collapse of the village.
It should be read by anyone who thinks that last year's Seattle demonstrations were an aberration.
What we have to realize is that this kind of failure is systematic, not an aberration.
